81.title: Peace Education
81.desc: Comprehensive peace education workshops for schools and communities, teaching conflict resolution and peaceful communication skills across East Africa.

82.title: Youth Empowerment Initiative
82.desc: Empowering young leaders through mentorship programs, skills training, and community service opportunities in 12 communities across 5 countries.

83.title: Community Reconciliation
83.desc: Facilitating dialogue and reconciliation processes in communities affected by conflict and division across the Great Lakes region.

84.title: Peace Leader Training
84.desc: Intensive leadership development program for emerging peace leaders and community organizers from 20 African nations.

85.title: Global Peace Summit 2026
85.desc: Annual international conference bringing together peace advocates, leaders, and organizations from around the world in Nairobi.

86.title: Girls Education Initiative
86.desc: Breaking barriers to girls' education through scholarships, mentorship programs, and community advocacy in rural communities across 8 regions.

87.title: Clean Water Access
87.desc: Building sustainable water wells and purification systems for 50 communities facing water scarcity across Kenya's arid and semi-arid regions.

88.title: Healthcare Outreach
88.desc: Mobile health clinics bringing essential healthcare services including vaccinations, maternal care, and health education to remote villages.

89.title: Sustainable Agriculture
89.desc: Training farmers in climate-resilient farming techniques, providing improved seeds and tools to 2,000 families across 5 agricultural regions.

90.title: Digital Literacy for All
90.desc: Bridging the digital divide by providing computer labs, internet access, and digital skills training to students in 100 underserved schools.

91.title: Emergency Relief Fund
91.desc: Rapid emergency response providing food, shelter, and medical aid to communities affected by natural disasters and humanitarian crises across East Africa.

92.title: Women Empowerment Program
92.desc: Empowering women through entrepreneurship training, financial literacy, and leadership development programs in 15 communities across 6 countries.

93.title: Climate Resilience Initiative
93.desc: Helping farming communities adapt to climate change through drought-resistant crops, water conservation techniques, and reforestation programs across 5 regions.

94.title: Orphanage Support Program
94.desc: Providing nutritious meals, school supplies, and psychosocial support to orphaned children across 25 care centers in Rwanda, DRC, and Burundi.

95.title: Sports for Peace
95.desc: Uniting communities through sports tournaments and youth leagues that promote teamwork, mutual respect, and cross-cultural understanding across 30 communities.

96.title: Refugee Support Program
96.desc: Providing shelter, education, and livelihood support to refugee families resettling in host communities across East Africa.

97.title: Mental Health Initiative
97.desc: Providing trauma counseling, mental health first aid training, and psychosocial support to communities affected by conflict and displacement.

98.title: Microfinance for Women
98.desc: Providing small business loans, financial literacy training, and mentorship to women entrepreneurs in underserved communities.

99.title: School Feeding Program
99.desc: Ensuring every child receives at least one nutritious meal per school day, improving attendance and academic performance across 200 schools.

100.title: Peace Journalism Training
100.desc: Training local journalists in conflict-sensitive reporting and peace journalism to promote understanding and reduce ethnic tension in media coverage.

101.title: Art for Peace Program
101.desc: Using music, theater, dance, and visual arts to heal trauma, bridge divides, and amplify youth voices in post-conflict communities.

102.title: Disaster Preparedness
102.desc: Building community resilience through early warning systems, emergency response training, and stockpiling essential supplies in disaster-prone regions.

103.title: Tree Planting Campaign
103.desc: Restoring degraded landscapes by planting 1 million trees across East Africa, combating desertification, and creating green jobs for local communities.

104.title: Vocational Skills Training
104.desc: Equipping out-of-school youth with marketable skills in carpentry, tailoring, IT, and renewable energy installation for sustainable livelihoods.

105.title: Interfaith Dialogue Initiative
105.desc: Bringing together religious leaders and communities from different faith traditions to build mutual understanding and prevent faith-based violence.

106.title: Peace League Africa Awards Gala 2026
106.desc: The Peace League Africa Awards Gala honours exceptional individuals and organizations working to build peace across the continent. With 62 award categories span

107.title: HWPL Interfaith Dialogue: Addressing Hate Speech Through Scriptures
107.desc: Religious Leaders and Scholars from different faiths gather to promote peace, understanding, respect, and harmony through interfaith dialogue.

108.title: Peace Education Summit 2026
108.desc: Bringing together educators, community leaders, and policymakers to advance peace curriculum across East African schools.

109.title: Youth Leadership Workshop
109.desc: A three-day intensive workshop empowering young leaders with conflict resolution, public speaking, and civic engagement skills.

110.title: Community Health Fair
110.desc: Free health screenings, nutrition counseling, and wellness education for underserved communities in the Great Lakes region.

111.title: Annual Gala & Fundraiser
111.desc: Our flagship fundraising event featuring guest speakers, beneficiary stories, and a celebration of peace-building achievements.

112.title: Water Well Inauguration — Turkana
112.desc: Join us as we commission our 50th clean water well, providing safe drinking water to over 5,000 community members.

113.title: Interfaith Dialogue Forum
113.desc: Religious and community leaders gather to foster mutual understanding and build bridges across faith traditions.

114.title: Peace Run 2026
114.desc: Hundreds of runners came together to promote peace and raise funds for community programs across the city.

115.title: Women in Peacebuilding Conference
115.desc: A landmark conference celebrating the role of women in conflict resolution and community reconciliation.

116.title: Clean Water Awareness Day
116.desc: Community members gathered to learn about water conservation and celebrate the completion of three new wells.
